Linker script template for defining memory regions and sections for STM32F439 firmware.

# Purpose
The file defines memory regions and sections for a software application, specifying how different parts of the program are allocated in memory. It uses placeholders such as `@KERNEL_RAM_ADDR@` and `@FW_FLASH_ORIGIN@` to dynamically set the origin and size of memory regions like `KERNEL_RAM`, `WORKER_RAM`, `APP_RAM`, and `FLASH`. The `CCM` region is statically defined with a fixed origin and length. The file also sets up aliases for specific memory regions, such as `REGION_ISR_STACK` and `REGION_KERNEL_STACKS`, to facilitate stack and heap management. Additionally, it defines a section for the interrupt service routine (ISR) vector table, ensuring it is correctly placed at the start of the `FLASH` region and provides a mechanism to keep the vector table in the final binary.
